title: Chef
description: Direct and participate in food preparation and cooking, plan menus, and supervise kitchen staff.
tasks: Plan menus and food preparation
Direct cooking and food preparation staff
Inspect supplies, equipment, and work areas for cleanliness
Monitor food for quality and portion control
workActivities: Creative Thinking — Developing new recipes and menus
Organizing and Planning — Coordinating kitchen operations and staff schedules
Performing Physical Activities — Preparing and cooking food in fast-paced environments

title: Firefighter
description: Control and extinguish fires, protect life and property, and conduct rescue efforts.
tasks: Respond to fire alarms and emergency calls
Rescue victims from burning buildings or accidents
Operate firefighting equipment and apparatus
Perform first aid and CPR on injured persons
workActivities: Performing Physical Activities — Carrying equipment and rescuing people
Making Decisions — Assessing danger and choosing rescue strategies
Assisting Others — Providing emergency medical care and community safety education

title: Park Naturalist
description: Plan and deliver programs to inform the public about natural areas such as parks and forests.
tasks: Develop and present nature education programs
Conduct field trips and guided nature walks
Maintain trails, exhibits, and nature facilities
Monitor wildlife populations and natural resources
workActivities: Communicating — Teaching visitors about ecosystems and conservation
Performing Physical Activities — Maintaining trails and conducting fieldwork
Getting Information — Researching local flora, fauna, and ecology

title: Pilot
description: Navigate and fly airplanes or helicopters to transport passengers or cargo safely.
tasks: Check aircraft before flights to ensure safety
Monitor instruments and weather conditions during flights
Communicate with air traffic control
Navigate and operate the aircraft controls
workActivities: Controlling Machines — Operating complex flight systems and instruments
Making Decisions — Responding to weather changes and emergencies
Getting Information — Monitoring flight instruments, fuel, and weather data

title: Police Officer
description: Maintain order, enforce laws, and protect people and property in communities.
tasks: Patrol assigned areas to maintain public safety
Respond to emergency and non-emergency calls
Investigate crimes and collect evidence
Write detailed reports of incidents and arrests
workActivities: Resolving Conflicts — Mediating disputes and maintaining public order
Making Decisions — Evaluating situations to determine appropriate action
Communicating — Interviewing witnesses and writing incident reports

title: Truck Driver
description: Drive heavy trucks to transport goods and materials over long distances.
tasks: Drive trucks along established routes
Load and unload cargo or arrange for loading
Inspect vehicles for mechanical issues before trips
Maintain logs of driving hours and cargo delivery
workActivities: Operating Vehicles — Driving and maneuvering large trucks safely
Inspecting Equipment — Checking vehicles and cargo for safety compliance
Documenting Information — Keeping accurate delivery and driving records

title: Carpenter
description: Construct, install, and repair structures and fixtures made of wood and other materials.
tasks: Measure and cut wood or other materials to specifications
Build frameworks including walls, floors, and doorframes
Install structures such as cabinets, siding, and trim
Read and interpret blueprints and building plans
workActivities: Handling Objects — Cutting, shaping, and assembling wood and materials
Inspecting Equipment — Ensuring structures meet safety and building codes
Getting Information — Reading blueprints and project specifications

title: Electrician
description: Install, maintain, and repair electrical wiring, equipment, and fixtures.
tasks: Install and maintain electrical systems in buildings
Inspect electrical components such as transformers and breakers
Diagnose malfunctioning equipment and systems
Read blueprints and technical diagrams
workActivities: Repairing — Fixing and maintaining electrical systems and wiring
Inspecting Equipment — Testing circuits to ensure safety and proper function
Getting Information — Reading technical plans and electrical codes

title: Farmer
description: Plan, direct, and coordinate farming operations for growing crops or raising livestock.
tasks: Plant, cultivate, and harvest crops
Monitor crop and animal health
Operate and maintain farm machinery and equipment
Manage business operations including budgets and supply purchases
workActivities: Performing Physical Activities — Planting, tending, and harvesting crops
Making Decisions — Planning planting schedules based on weather and markets
Controlling Machines — Operating tractors, harvesters, and irrigation systems

title: Mechanic

tasks: Diagnose vehicle problems using diagnostic equipment
Repair or replace worn or broken parts
Perform routine maintenance such as oil changes and tire rotations
Test drive vehicles to verify repairs
workActivities: Repairing — Fixing engines, brakes, transmissions, and other vehicle systems
Inspecting Equipment — Using diagnostic tools to identify mechanical issues
Updating Knowledge — Staying current with new vehicle technologies

title: Biologist
description: Study living organisms and their relationships to the environment.
tasks: Conduct research on living organisms
Collect and analyze biological data and samples
Write research papers and reports
Design and conduct experiments in laboratories or the field
workActivities: Analyzing Data — Studying specimens and interpreting research findings
Documenting Information — Writing research reports and scientific papers
Thinking Creatively — Designing experiments to test hypotheses

title: Chemist
description: Conduct research and experiments to develop new products and processes.
tasks: Analyze substances to determine their composition
Develop new chemical products and processes
Conduct tests and quality control on materials

workActivities: Analyzing Data — Interpreting chemical test results and experimental data
Processing Information — Using scientific methods to solve chemical problems
Documenting Information — Recording test results and writing technical reports

workActivities: Working with Computers — Writing, testing, and debugging program code
